name: Sopa Leao Velloso
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bouquet garni using a celery stalk tied with whole peppercorns, cloves, and parsley.
2. Cut head from grouper. Slice fish into 1-inch steaks and set aside.
3. Place fish head in a large pot of cold water. Add salt and bring to boil, then add bouquet garni. Simmer for 1.5 hours. Discard fish head and bouquet garni, reserving edible parts of fish head.
4. Using fish stock, cook shrimps in their shells for 10 minutes or until they turn pink. Remove, discard shells and black veins, and reserve seafood.
5. Using the same stock, heat mussels or clams in their shell for 5 minutes or until shell opens. Remove from stock, remove seafood from shells, and reserve seafood.
6. Strain stock to remove any sand or shell particles.
7. Use a little oil to saute onions, garlic, tomatoes, coriander, parsley, and cayenne pepper just until vegetables soften. Add the vegetable mixture to fish stock.
8. Heat remaining oil and gently fry grouper steaks. Remove skin and bones, break grouper into pieces, and add to stock mixture along with crab, lobster, shrimp, mussels, and edible part of grouper head.
